introSection: The Barnstormer is a steel roller coaster located at Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This ride is a mirror image of Vekoma's Junior Coaster (207m) with a minor lift hill change and a transfer track. The ride only goes round once.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.

fullText:
The Barnstormer is a steel roller coaster located at Magic Kingdom in Lake Buena Vista, Florida, USA.

This ride is a mirror image of Vekoma's Junior Coaster (207m) with a minor lift hill change and a transfer track. The ride only goes round once.

2 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train.
